name: Kohl's Chocolate Sheath Cake
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Requires a 16 x 11 x 1 or 11 x 17 x 1 pan.
1. Sift together cinnamon, sugar, flour, and baking soda.
2. In a large bowl, bring oleo, Crisco, cocoa, and water to a boil. Pour over the dry ingredients. Mix well, then add buttermilk, eggs, and vanilla. Mix until combined.
3. Grease a shallow pan (see note) and pour in the batter. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven until a toothpick comes out clean. Test baking time according to your oven; adjust as needed.
4. Frost the hot cake with chocolate frosting and top with nuts. Fudge frosting works best for this sheath cake.
NOTE: Recipe from IT NEVER TURNS OUT THE SAME WAY COOKBOOK, A Collection of Recipes from the Kitchen of Joyce & Clem Kohl.
